title: AI Agents
planLimitsDesc: You are currently on the <0>{{plan}}</0> plan. You can create up to <1>{{botsLimit}}</1> Chatbot{{botsPlural}} and connect <2>{{integrationsLimit}}</2> Integration{{integrationsPlural}} per chatbot.
limitReachedTooltip: You have reached your limit of {{limit}} chatbot{{plural}} for this plan.

empty.message: No chatbots yet — create your first one

messages.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? All data associated with this bot will be permanently removed.
messages.deleteSuccess: Chatbot and all its data deleted successfully

integration_errors.httpsRequired: Facebook integration requires a secure connection (HTTPS). Please ensure you are using your secure tunnel URL (e.g., https://...) instead of localhost.
integration_errors.sdkLoadError: Facebook SDK could not be loaded. Please check your internet connection or disable ad-blockers.

integrations_page.title: Integrations
integrations_page.subtitle: Connect your chatbot to multiple channels and platforms.

facebook.name: Facebook Messenger
facebook.description: Connect your chatbot to your Facebook Page. Powered by n8n automation.

n8n_facebook.name: Facebook Messenger
n8n_facebook.description: Connect your chatbot to your Facebook Page. Powered by n8n automation.

whatsapp.name: WhatsApp Business
whatsapp.description: Deploy your AI assistant to WhatsApp.

instagram.name: Instagram
instagram.description: Answer DMs and comments on Instagram.

website.name: Website Widget
website.description: Add your chatbot to your website.

webhook.name: Custom Webhook
webhook.description: Connect your chatbot to custom workflows.

custom_api.name: REST API
custom_api.description: Use API endpoints to connect your own app.

integration_details.title: {{platform}} details
integration_details.facebookDescription: Review which Facebook Page is connected and when it may need attention.
integration_details.whatsappDescription: Review which WhatsApp number is connected and when it may need attention.
integration_details.instagramDescription: Review which Instagram account is connected and when it may need attention.
integration_details.noMetadata: No connection metadata is available yet.
integration_details.facebookReconnectNote: Reconnect if someone removes REMOVEDAI permission from the Facebook Page, your Page role changes, the Facebook account password/security settings change, or this card shows a reconnect warning.
integration_details.whatsappReconnectNote: Reconnect if the WhatsApp number is removed from Meta, permissions are changed, the token is rotated, or this card shows a reconnect warning.
integration_details.instagramReconnectNote: Reconnect if the Instagram account is unlinked from its Facebook Page, permissions are changed, or this card shows a reconnect warning.

whatsapp_modal.title: Connect WhatsApp
whatsapp_modal.description: Connect a WhatsApp Business number to this chatbot.
whatsapp_modal.embeddedDescription: Your customer can connect a WhatsApp Business number through Meta without copying API credentials.
whatsapp_modal.embeddedUnavailable: Embedded Signup is not configured yet. Finish Meta Business verification, add the WhatsApp configuration ID, and set the required environment variables.
whatsapp_modal.advancedDescription: Use this only if you already have WhatsApp Cloud API credentials.
whatsapp_modal.missingEmbeddedPhone: Meta did not return the WhatsApp phone number. Please try again after Business verification is complete.
whatsapp_modal.signupCancelled: WhatsApp signup was cancelled or not completed.

instagram_modal.title: Connect Instagram
instagram_modal.description: Select the Instagram professional account you want to connect to this chatbot.
instagram_modal.empty: No linked Instagram professional accounts found.
instagram_modal.emptyHint: Make sure the Instagram account is professional and linked to a Facebook Page you manage.
instagram_modal.loginFailed: Instagram login failed or was cancelled.
instagram_modal.missingSession: Instagram login session was not found. Please reconnect the account.

new_bot.files_dropzone: Drag & drop files here, or click to select files
new_bot.website_info: We'll crawl the provided URL, extract the text content, and clean it automatically for training your AI agent.
new_bot.qa_pairs_desc: You can add specific question and answer pairs after the chatbot is created in the Sources tab.
new_bot.terms_note: By creating a chatbot, you agree to our terms of service. Training may take a few seconds depending on the source size.

edit_bot.title: Edit Chatbot
edit_bot.update_note: Updating your chatbot will re-train its knowledge base. This might take a few seconds.
edit_bot.website_info: We'll crawl the provided URL, extract the text content, and clean it automatically.
edit_bot.qa_desc: You can add specific question and answer pairs in the Sources tab for better control.

sources.title: Sources
sources.drag_files: Drag & drop files here, or click to select files
sources.website_info: We'll crawl the provided URL, extract the text content, and clean it automatically for training your AI agent.
sources.file_no_edit: File sources cannot be edited directly.
sources.file_no_edit_desc: To update a PDF or Word document, please delete this source and upload a new version.

bot_settings.title: Chatbot Settings
bot_settings.name: Name
bot_settings.delete_confirm_desc: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This will permanently remove all messages, training data, and integrations associated with this bot.

compare.title: Model Comparison
compare.input_placeholder: Type your message to compare both models…
compare.quota_note: Each comparison uses 2 AI messages from your quota

chat_test.title: Chat Playground
chat_test.subtitle: Configure and test your chatbot in real-time.

config.title: Bot Configuration
config.desc: Define how your AI assistant behaves and which model it uses.
config.system_prompt_desc: এখানে বিস্তারিত লিখে দিন আপনার এআই অ্যাসিস্ট্যান্ট কে এবং তাকে কাস্টমারদের সাথে কীভাবে কথা বলতে হবে। এটি যত বিস্তারিত হবে, your bot তত বুদ্ধিমান হবে.
config.placeholder: Example: You are a friendly customer support agent for REMOVED AI...

preview.start_convo_desc: Test how your bot responds to different customer queries.
